title: Project Metadata, Assets, PyInstaller 6.21, Platforms, and Clean Launch
description: The game depends on the current directory, omits fonts and sound, builds one executable on Linux and calls it cross-platform, lacks licenses, and is never installed fresh. Learners cumulatively produce portable inspected game release candidate through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Declare Python and dependency bounds, entry point, package data, license, authorship, version, and reproducible environment metadata.
Resolve packaged resources through supported APIs instead of current working directory or mutable source paths.
Build with PyInstaller on each target OS, inspect analysis and contents, handle data and native libraries, and test one-folder before one-file.
